title: Prove nullifier uniqueness across all three circuits
description: HumanUniqueness uses Poseidon2(scope, secret), AgentPolicy uses a nullifier derived from credential fields + nonce, and Delegation has its own delegationNullifier. No formal argument exists that these three nullifier domains are collision-resistant across circuits. Write a formal property showing domain separation: prove that no valid witness for circuit A can produce a nullifierHash that equals a valid nullifierHash from circuit B, by demonstrating the Poseidon input arities and domain tags differ. Deliver: a symbolic analysis document with Halo2 MockProver test cases exercising cross-circuit nullifier values on shared inputs.
